images.alt: A man is holding a pair of dark brown suede Velasca penny loafers.
A man is wearing a dark grey Velasca suit and a bordeaux shirt.
Close-up of a man wearing a light brown woven leather Velasca belt.
Inside a historic apartment with Sicilian majolica floors, a man is seated wearing a dark grey Velasca suit with a bordeaux shirt.
A man in the Sicilian coastal countryside is wearing a beige ribbed double-breasted cardigan and a striped bowling-collar shirt.
A man and a woman ride a wooden sled down a snowy valley. She wears an oversized Velasca Women shearling jacket, he wears an aviator shearling from the Velasca menswear collection.
A man wears a double-breasted Prince of Wales check wool blazer with a ribbed crewneck sweater, among mountain pastures with cows in the background.
A man wears a brown single-breasted wool coat paired with a beige crewneck sweater and a light blue shirt. Inside a mountain lodge with wooden furniture.

textContent.name: shopify-section
paragraphs: Always a step aheadYou're one of us now

Stories and inspiration, Made in Italy style. In your inbox, every week.Thank you for joining the great Velasca family.  We promise we'll have fun together! It will be like going to the moon in a pair of shoes.

textContent.name: Footer
paragraphs: Velasca was created to offer you artisanal quality shoes and clothing at a fair price. To be worn for a lifetime. We really care, so if you have any doubts, do get in touch.
